---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve SocialAI Pro
title: '[BUG] '
labels: 'bug'
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description

**A clear and concise description of what the bug is.**

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior

**A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.**

## ❌ Actual Behavior

**A clear and concise description of what actually happened.**

## 📱 Environment Information

**Please complete the following information:**

### Browser
- **Browser:** [e.g. Chrome, Firefox, Safari]
- **Version:** [e.g. 22]
- **Operating System:** [e.g. iOS, Windows, macOS, Linux]

### Application
- **Version:** [e.g. 1.0.0]
- **Environment:** [e.g. Development, Staging, Production]
- **URL:** [e.g. https://app.socialai-pro.com]

### Device
- **Type:** [e.g. Desktop, Mobile, Tablet]
- **Model:** [e.g. iPhone 14, MacBook Pro]
- **Screen Size:** [e.g. 1920x1080, Mobile viewport]

## 📸 Screenshots

**If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.**

## 📋 Console Logs

**If applicable, paste any relevant browser console logs:**

```
Paste console errors here
```

## 🔧 Additional Context

**Add any other context about the problem here.**

### Reproducibility
- [ ] This bug happens every time
- [ ] This bug happens sometimes
- [ ] This bug happened only once

### Severity
- [ ] Critical (application crashes, data loss)
- [ ] High (feature completely broken)
- [ ] Medium (feature partially broken)
- [ ] Low (cosmetic issue)

### Feature Area
- [ ] Authentication/Login
- [ ] Post Creation
- [ ] Scheduling
- [ ] Analytics
- [ ] Team Management
- [ ] AI Suggestions
- [ ] Settings/Customization
- [ ] Navigation
- [ ] Other: _____________

## 🤝 Contribution

**Would you like to work on fixing this bug?**
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR
- [ ] No, but I can help with testing
- [ ] No, just reporting

## 📎 Additional Files

**If applicable, attach any relevant files:**
- Error logs
- Screenshots
- Screen recordings
- Configuration files (remove sensitive data)

---

**🚨 Security Issues**
If this bug involves security vulnerabilities, please email security@socialai-pro.com instead of creating a public issue.
